creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Is USB bug 179109 a duplicate? 

> After detach USB Flash a keyboard does not work.

Bug 179109 comment 1: 

> Fix
> ---
> Remove  device   kbdmux  (# keyboard multiplexer) in kernel config.
> After detach USB Flash drive a keyboard work fine.

----

See also: bug 192377
